name: NS1
description: NS1 (IBM NS1 Connect) managed DNS and traffic management platform

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your NS1 account
2. Go to Account → Settings → API Keys
3. Click Add API Key
4. Grant read-only permissions and copy the key

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Create an API key in NS1 → Account → Settings → API Keys

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies NS1 DNS zones are configured and available

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews NS1 team members to verify access control
